title: Senior, Full Stack AI Engineer / Developer ,  Python ,ReactJS (8+ Years Experience)
company_focus: Data storage technologies, HDDs, and cloud platforms
description:
Company Description

At Western Digital, our vision is to power global innovation
and push the boundaries of technology to make what you
thought was once impossible, possible.

At our core, Western Digital is a company of problem
solvers. People achieve extraordinary things given the right
technology. For decades, we’ve been doing just that—our
technology helped people put a man on the moon and capture
the first-ever picture of a black hole.

We offer an expansive portfolio of technologies, HDDs, and
platforms for business, creative professionals, and
consumers alike under our Western Digital®, WD®, WD_BLACK™,
and SanDisk® Professional brands.

We are a key partner to some of the largest and highest-
growth organizations in the world. From enabling systems to
make cities safer and more connected, to powering the data
centers behind many of the world’s biggest companies and
hyperscale cloud providers, to meeting the massive and ever-
growing data storage needs of the AI era, Western Digital is
fueling a brighter, smarter future.

Today’s exceptional challenges require your unique skills.
Together, we can build the future of data storage.

Job Description

Role Overview

The Senior AI Engineer will be responsible for designing and
deploying comprehensive AI workflows to transform sales,
marketing, and e-commerce processes. This position demands
advanced expertise in Python-driven AI orchestration, as
well as robust frontend and backend development skills using
frameworks like CrewAI, LangChain, LangGraph, ReactJS, and
Go or Rust. Experience with REST API development for system
integration is required. Familiarity with Amazon Bedrock for
prompt engineering and AI decision-making is essential.

Key Responsibilities

- AI Workflow Orchestration: Proficiency with LangGraph,
  LangChain, or AWS Bedrock AgentCore for building complex,
  multi-step AI agents capable of automating tasks such as
  lead scoring, customer segmentation, and personalized
  e-commerce experiences.
- Prompt Engineering & MLOps: Managing the prompt lifecycle
  using tools such as PromptLayer and LangSmith, with the
  ability to design rigorous evaluation frameworks for
  assessing model performance and safety.
- High-Performance Engineering: Develop internal tools and
  client-facing applications utilizing frameworks like
  ReactJS, Go, or Rust to deliver high-performance frontend
  and backend solutions.
- System Integration: Implement reliable API integrations
  among Salesforce (CRM), Marketo (Marketing), and data
  warehouses including Azure and Oracle Exadata.
- Marketing/Sales Automation: Comprehensive knowledge of
  Salesforce and Marketo API ecosystems to enable automation
  of personalized leads and e-commerce conversion
  activities.
- Data Pipeline Development: Construct scalable data pipelines
  for ingesting, processing, and delivering real-time
  insights from Oracle Exadata into AI models.
- Application Development: Build robust, high-availability
  applications that enhance both internal sales operations
  and external customer engagement.

Qualifications

Required Technical Qualifications

- Software Engineering: Minimum of 8 years’ experience in
  software engineering with an emphasis on full-stack
  development and AI systems integration.
- Python Expertise: Extensive proficiency in Python for end-
  to-end AI solution development, including LLM
  orchestration via LangChain and LangGraph.
- API Development: Skilled in developing APIs using Python or
  other industry-standard frameworks.
- Frontend/Backend Development: Strong background in ReactJS,
  with advanced expertise in either Go or Rust for
  developing low-latency components.
- Platform Knowledge: Hands-on experience working with
  Salesforce and Marketo.
- Data Management: Solid foundation in SQL and data management
  within Oracle Exadata and Azure environments.

Preferred Qualifications

- Experience with agent development tools such as Agentforce
  or Copilot Studio.
- Familiarity with e-commerce platforms and automated campaign
  management systems.
- AWS Certified Machine Learning – Specialty.



Additional Information

Western Digital is committed to providing equal
opportunities to all applicants and employees and will not
discriminate against any applicant or employee based on
their race, color, ancestry, religion (including religious
dress and grooming standards), sex (including pregnancy,
childbirth or related medical conditions, breastfeeding or
related medical conditions), gender (including a person’s
gender identity, gender expression, and gender-related
appearance and behavior, whether or not stereotypically
associated with the person’s assigned sex at birth), age,
national origin, sexual orientation, medical condition,
marital status (including domestic partnership status),
physical disability, mental disability, medical condition,
genetic information, protected medical and family care
leave, Civil Air Patrol status, military and veteran status,
or other legally protected characteristics. We also prohibit
harassment of any individual on any of the characteristics
listed above. Our non-discrimination policy applies to all
aspects of employment. We comply with the laws and
regulations set forth in the "Know Your Rights: Workplace
Discrimination is Illegal” poster. Our pay transparency
policy is available here.

Western Digital thrives on the power and potential of
diversity. As a global company, we believe the most
effective way to embrace the diversity of our customers and
communities is to mirror it from within. We believe the
fusion of various perspectives results in the best outcomes
for our employees, our company, our customers, and the world
around us. We are committed to an inclusive environment
where every individual can thrive through a sense of
belonging, respect and contribution.

Western Digital is committed to offering opportunities to
applicants with disabilities and ensuring all candidates can
successfully navigate our careers website and our hiring
process. Please contact us at jobs.accommodations@wdc.com to
advise us of your accommodation request. In your email,
please include a description of the specific accommodation
you are requesting as well as the job title and requisition
number of the position for which you are applying.

Based on our experience, we anticipate that the application
deadline will be 09/13/2025 (3 months from posting),
although we reserve the right to close the application
process sooner if we hire an applicant for this position
before the application deadline. If we are not able to hire
someone from this role before the application deadline, we
will update this posting with a new anticipated application
deadline.

responsibilities: Design and deploy comprehensive AI workflows to transform sales, marketing, and e-commerce processes using LangGraph, LangChain, and AWS Bedrock AgentCore
Build complex multi-step AI agents for automating lead scoring, customer segmentation, and personalized e-commerce experiences
Manage prompt lifecycle and design evaluation frameworks for assessing model performance using PromptLayer and LangSmith
Develop high-performance internal tools and client-facing applications using ReactJS, Go, or Rust
Implement reliable API integrations among Salesforce, Marketo, and data warehouses including Azure and Oracle Exadata
Construct scalable data pipelines for ingesting, processing, and delivering real-time insights from Oracle Exadata into AI models
use_cases: Lead scoring and customer segmentation for sales teams
Automated marketing campaign management through Marketo integration
Salesforce CRM automation for personalized lead engagement
Real-time data processing and insights from Oracle Exadata warehouse
ai_classification_reasoning:
The role involves building, deploying, and orchestrating AI
workflows using LangGraph, LangChain, CrewAI, and AWS
Bedrock AgentCore to create multi-step AI agents. This is
hands-on work directly on AI/LLM systems including prompt
engineering, LLM orchestration, and model evaluation
frameworks.
